Check "Background graphics" in print options to keep the colors.

For Hospice & Social Work Professionals

When a Family Needs a Notary
and Can't Leave the Bedside

We come directly to the patient — at the hospital, nursing home, or hospice facility. Same-day and after-hours available throughout the Charlotte area.

Available Same Day  ·  After Hours  ·  Weekends   Call or Text: 980-372-4103

When a patient urgently needs legal documents notarized — and their family can't leave them to find a notary — Integrity Closings CLT is the resource you can hand to that family right now. We specialize in bedside notarizations and handle every visit with professionalism and compassion.

Situations We Handle Every Week

No Power of Attorney in Place

A family discovers their loved one has no POA and decisions need to be made. We notarize the document at bedside while the patient is still able to sign.

Healthcare Directive Needed

A patient wants to document their end-of-life wishes before it's too late. We handle advance directives and healthcare POA with care and discretion.

Family Arriving from Out of Town

A family member flies in and needs documents notarized immediately. We can meet them at the facility the same day they arrive.

Property or Financial Decisions

A patient needs to sign a deed, financial POA, or estate document while hospitalized. We travel to them — no transportation required.

Documents We Notarize at the Bedside

Estate & Legal

  • Durable Power of Attorney
  • Healthcare Power of Attorney
  • Living Wills & Advance Directives
  • Trust Documents
  • Last Will & Testament

Property & Financial

  • Deeds (Warranty, Quitclaim)
  • Financial Affidavits
  • Real estate documents
  • General Affidavits
  • Business documents

Give This Number to the Family

When a family asks where to find a notary, hand them this flyer. Frank responds quickly, explains the process clearly, and handles the appointment with the professionalism the situation calls for. We follow all hospital visitor protocols and coordinate with nursing staff before entering patient rooms.

980-372-4103 Call or Text Anytime

FC

Frank L. Coxx — Integrity Closings CLT  ·  NC Commissioned Notary Public

Charlotte-area mobile notary specializing in hospital, nursing home, and hospice bedside notarizations. Serving Atrium Health, Novant Health, and care facilities throughout Charlotte, Mint Hill, Matthews, Monroe, Indian Trail, Waxhaw, Pineville, and surrounding areas.

Notarization services only — not legal advice.
